feedback.text: Please for the sake of consumers everywhere widen the aims of the initiative to include the problematic practice of publishers deactivating a digital products servers without any sort of end of life plan, leaving it unplayable for the consumers This happened to me with the videogame Darkspore, I purchased the game from Electronic Arts in 2016 and a matter of weeks later the serves were shut down with no end of life patch to remove the Digital rights management systems which barred access to the game because it was unable to contact the Electronic Arts servers
